pkgmetadata.longdescription: ConstantlyA library that provides symbolic constant support.It includes collections and constants with text, numeric, and bit flag values.Originally twisted.python.constants from the Twisted httpstwistedmatrix.com_ project.Tests-----To run tests toxThis will run tests on Python 2.7, 3.3, 3.4, and PyPy, as well as doing coverage and pyflakes checks.
